description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a prominent multi-hipped roof in a muted brown color. The front features a double garage with a driveway, a covered porch with white railings, and multiple tall windows with white framing. On one side, there is a spacious balcony above the porch, while the rear of the house opens to a backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and a patio area furnished with outdoor seating. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick or stucco, and the windows are symmetrically arranged, giving the house a balanced and elegant appearance. The architectural style blends traditional and modern suburban elements, with clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a multi-hipped roof, double garage, covered porch, balcony, and a backyard pool. The exterior features light-colored walls, symmetrical windows, and spacious outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, driveway with a car, covered porch with white railings, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony above the porch and the symmetrical arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating area, and rear entry to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the pool area extending along the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, white railings, steps, and a double garage door adjacent to the entrance.
